description:
The core change: make `WorkflowStateMachine::apply()` return `Result<WorkflowMachineState, TransitionError>` instead of silently accepting any event.

Changes:
1. Add `TransitionError` enum in `crates/orchestrator-core/src/state_machines/engine.rs`:
   ```rust
   #[derive(Debug, Clone, thiserror::Error)]
   pub enum TransitionError {
       #[error("no transition from {from:?} on event {event:?}")]
       NoTransition { from: WorkflowMachineState, event: WorkflowMachineEvent },
       #[error("guard '{guard}' blocked transition from {from:?} on {event:?}")]
       GuardBlocked { from: WorkflowMachineState, event: WorkflowMachineEvent, guard: String },
   }
   ```

2. Change `CompiledWorkflowMachine::apply()` (engine.rs ~line 163) to return `Result<WorkflowTransitionOutcome, TransitionError>`:
   - If no transition matches (from, event): return `Err(TransitionError::NoTransition)`
   - If a transition matches but guard fails: return `Err(TransitionError::GuardBlocked)`
   - If matched and guard passes: return `Ok(outcome)` as before

3. Change `WorkflowStateMachine::apply()` (state_machine.rs ~line 40) to return `Result<WorkflowMachineState, TransitionError>`:
   ```rust
   pub fn apply(&mut self, event: WorkflowMachineEvent) -> Result<WorkflowMachineState, TransitionError> {
       let outcome = self.definition.apply(self.current, event, |_| true)?;
       self.current = outcome.to;
       Ok(self.current)
   }
   ```

4. Change `apply_with_guard_context()` similarly to return `Result<WorkflowTransitionOutcome, TransitionError>`.

5. Update ALL existing tests in engine.rs that check `outcome.matched == false` to instead check `Err(TransitionError::...)`.

6. Export `TransitionError` from `crates/orchestrator-core/src/state_machines/mod.rs`.

7. Add tests:
   - Invalid event from each state returns NoTransition
   - Guard failure returns GuardBlocked
   - Valid transitions still return Ok

Key files:
- `crates/orchestrator-core/src/state_machines/engine.rs`
- `crates/orchestrator-core/src/state_machines/mod.rs`
- `crates/orchestrator-core/src/workflow/state_machine.rs`

Build: `cargo ao-bin-check` (will fail on call sites — TASK-181 fixes those)
Tests: `cargo test -p orchestrator-core --lib -- state_machines` should pass
title: Make state machine apply() return Result and validate transitions
